name: North
description: The direction towards the top of a map or compass.

name: North-East
description: The direction midway between north and east.

name: East
description: The direction towards the right side of a map or compass.

name: South-East
description: The direction midway between south and east.

name: South
description: The direction towards the bottom of a map or compass.

name: South-West
description: The direction midway between south and west.

name: West
description: The direction towards the left side of a map or compass.

name: North-West
description: The direction midway between north and west.
